label: The Storyteller
gift: Poignance — weaving loss into meaning and grief into belonging.

cards.name: Notice the story you are already telling — Sense
cards.essence: In yourself: poignance — loss into meaning, sensing what is here.
steps: Notice what is actually here, sensing what is here.
Practice it within: the story you are already telling.
Shadow check: the Performer — spectacle over truth.
